name: fraud-detection
description: Detects fraudulent transactions using transaction patterns, merchant data, and behavioral anomaly detection.
long_description: This circuit provides verifiable fraud detection for payment transactions. It analyzes transaction amount, merchant category, timestamp, and cardholder location against historical patterns to detect anomalies. The circuit produces a cryptographic proof of fraud risk assessment, enabling financial institutions to maintain transparent, auditable fraud prevention systems.

public.name: flagged
public.description: Whether transaction is flagged for review

public.name: anomaly_indicators
public.description: Array of detected anomalies (unusual_amount, unusual_location, unusual_time, etc.)

author: VRL Finance Working Group
security_notes: Uses pattern-based anomaly detection. Effectiveness depends on quality of historical transaction data. Designed for real-time processing.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 7. Proof generation time: ~90ms. Proof size: ~2KB. Uses BN254 curve for efficiency.

changelog.changes: Initial release with anomaly-based fraud detection
